title: Design Lead, Litigant Experience
summary: Design the court a litigant actually touches: SMS journeys, filing flows, hearing schedules and orders that ordinary people can read and act on.
body:
## The role

For most litigants the court is not a building, it is a text message, a form and a long wait. You will design all three so they inform instead of intimidate.

[draft description, refine before publishing]

## What you'll do

- Own the litigant-facing experience of DRISTI end to end
- Run field research with litigants, lawyers and court staff in partner districts
- Build and maintain the design system the whole platform draws from

## Who this suits

- 5+ years in product or service design, with shipped work you can show
- Experience designing for low-bandwidth, multi-lingual, first-time users
- Comfort testing in a courtroom corridor, not just a lab

## How it works

Full-time role with a PUCAR collective member organisation. Remote within India, with regular field visits.
